title: App crashes when saving profile
description: When I update my profile information and click Save, the app crashes and returns to the login screen. I lose my changes every time.
reasoning: The ticket describes an application crash while saving profile data, indicating a functional failure rather than a billing or feature request.

title: Duplicate billing charge on monthly invoice
description: I have been charged twice for the same monthly subscription this week. Please review and refund the duplicate transaction.
reasoning: The user reports duplicate charges on a subscription invoice, which is a billing issue rather than a technical bug or feature request.

title: Add dark mode to dashboard
description: Please add a dark theme option so the dashboard is easier to use at night. The current UI is too bright for evening work.
reasoning: This is a request to add a new UI/theme capability, so it matches a feature enhancement category.

title: How do I delete my account?
description: I want to permanently close my account and remove all stored data. Please explain the steps and any data retention policy.
reasoning: The request is informational and administrative rather than a bug, billing issue, or feature request.

title: API request limit exceeded too quickly
description: Our integration hits the API limit after only a few requests even though we are on the standard plan. Please check the rate limit settings.
reasoning: The issue describes an API limit being reached unexpectedly, which is likely a system behavior or bug affecting normal integration flows.
